items.name: crt-smallest-integer
items.problem: Find the smallest positive integer n such that n leaves remainder 1 when divided by 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6, and n is divisible by 7.

items.name: heron-area
items.problem: A triangle has side lengths 13, 14, and 15. What is its area?

items.name: divisor-count
items.problem: How many positive divisors does 360 have?

items.name: quadratic-symmetric
items.problem: If x + 1/x = 3 and x > 0, what is x^2 + 1/x^2?
